prompt: A minimalist flat vector illustration on a light gray background showing a stylized pelican riding a bicycle, composed from simple geometric SVG-like shapes with thick dark charcoal outlines and sparse details. The bicycle is shown in side view with 2 large wheels, each with a circular rim and a simple cross of 4 spokes, a black frame, seat, crank, and handlebars, resting on a single thin horizontal ground line near the bottom. The pelican is abstract and slightly awkward, built from clean outlined shapes: a white circular-oval body positioned over the bike, 2 narrow orange-yellow leg shapes hanging down toward the pedals, a white neck and head extending forward, 1 small black eye, a long triangular orange-yellow upper beak, and 1 large pale pink lower pouch. Add a separate white wing shape angled upward above the body. Keep the composition intentionally simple and a little imperfect, as if it were an SVG demo drawing generated from code in a code editor screenshot, but render only the artwork itself with no interface, no text, no shadows, and no extra scenery.
